allow: Bash(git add android/app/build.gradle.kts android/settings.gradle.kts pubspec.yaml pubspec.lock firebase.json lib/firebase_options.dart ios/Runner/GoogleService-Info.plist macos/Runner/GoogleService-Info.plist)

Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
fix: configure Firebase Android integration and resolve channel-error

Fix PlatformException(channel-error) by properly configuring Firebase for Android and updating dependencies.

Android Configuration:
- Add Google Services plugin to settings.gradle.kts and app/build.gradle.kts
- Add Firebase BoM (34.4.0) for dependency management
- Add Firebase Analytics and Auth dependencies
- Enable MultiDex support for Firebase
- Set minSdk to 23 (required by Firebase)

Dependencies:
- Remove firebase_core_platform_interface override (5.4.0)
- Update to latest compatible version (6.0.2)
- Update pubspec.lock with new dependency versions

Firebase Options:
- Add firebase_options.dart for multi-platform configuration
- Add GoogleService-Info.plist for iOS and macOS
- Add firebase.json for Firebase CLI configuration

This fixes the "Unable to establish connection on channel" error that was preventing Firebase initialization on Android.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
refactor: use AsyncNotifier state properly in RestAuthUC and SignUpForm

Remove mutable fields \(isLoggedIn, isLoading, code\) from RestAuthUC in favor
of proper state emissions via AsyncValue. Add ref.listen in SignUpForm for
navigation on success and SnackBar on error. Fix status code condition to
accept full 2xx range.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
refactor: migrate SignInForm to use restAuthUCProvider with proper state management

Replace broken authLogicProvider reference with restAuthUCProvider. Remove
artificial Timer delay, manual isLoading/isLogin fields, and then/catchError
chain. Use ref.listen for navigation and error feedback via SnackBar.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
refactor: use ref.listen + refreshListenable pattern in routerProvider for stable GoRouter instance

Replace ref.watch with ref.listen + ValueNotifier so GoRouter is created once
and re-evaluates redirects via refreshListenable on auth state changes. Add
auth-aware redirect logic with storage validation, remove dead code and unused
variables.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
